_meta.benchmark_name: NONMEM Run 504f — One-Compartment with Fixed Covariates (ADVAN1 TRANS2)
_meta.dataset: 501.csv — 60 subjects, 240 IV-infusion observations, covariates: WT, AGE, SEX (some fixed)
_meta.model: 1-compartment IV infusion, some covariate exponents fixed (TRANS4 NONMEM convention), BLOCK(2) OMEGA, proportional error
notes: 504f is the fixed-covariate variant: WT exponents set to 0.75 (CL) and 1.0 (V), SEX multipliers fixed to 1.0.
OpenPKPD achieves OFV=1179.22 (10.7% worse than NONMEM 1065.36).
AGE exponent for V fixed to 0.0 in NONMEM run.
_meta.dataset_citation: Bauer RJ (2019). NONMEM tutorial part II: estimation methods and diagnostics for nonlinear mixed-effects models with examples from pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic studies. CPT Pharmacometrics Syst Pharmacol 8(8):538-556. [Dataset 504.csv: 60 subjects, IV infusion, 1-compartment with fixed covariate exponents.]
